message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings (uninlined_format_args, useless_format, cast_possible_wrap)

- src/main.rs: inline format args for size_str, total_files, line,
  sparkline, reply_to; remove useless format! wrapper
- tests/daemon_e2e.rs: use map_or_else instead of map().unwrap_or_else(),
  inline format args in asserts, add #[allow] for PID casts to i32

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
